name: Bodhi Tree Biotechnology Inc
summary: PART I Overview Bodhi Tree Biotechnology Inc. (us, our, we, or the Company) was incorporated in the State of Delaware on December12, 2023. We are an early-stage consulting company focused on providing plant-based menu design, recipe development, and vegetarian diet consulting services. Our executive office is located in Danville, California. We believe that our menu design, recipe development, and consulting services align with increasing consumer interest in flexitarian, vegetarian, and organic...
